title: Hosting Projects
description: Projects that occur in Puente Genil, Córdoba. Groups of up to 36 young people pass through the Andalusian town and enjoy the intercultural experience.

title: Sending Projects
description: Projects that occur throughout the international terrain that cover the countries associated with the Erasmus+ program. These projects involve the international mobility of a group of Spanish participants who represent Erasmiau and their country, Spain.

title: Interrail
description: Within the "Inclusion for DiscoverEU" action, participants aged 18 and over can enjoy the Interrail experience in collaboration with the Erasmiau association. A new program that since its recent implementation we have executed as beneficiaries from our association.

title: Solidarity Projects (ESC)
description: Solidarity Local Projects that developed our youngsters inside the concept of volunteering in a local way and with the magical touch of solidarity.

title: KA2: Cooperation partnerships in youth
description: International Cooperation to achieve the best from the best in YOUTH :D

title: Local projects
description: What we do in our community :D
